description: Game system awareness, mechanical quirks, and fourth-wall-bending weaknesses.
weaknesses: Mage Hand Ticklish
Invisible magical touches send it into helpless, giggling convulsions. It wards against unseen forces obsessively and panics at the faintest spectral brush.
Familiar Confusion
It cannot tell a wizard from a familiar. It attacks the cat before the caster, baffled by the bond between them, and its targeting is laughably poor.
Prestidigitation Pranks
The simplest magical tricks overwhelm it. A minor illusion becomes a crisis. Street magicians terrify it, and cantrips hit harder than they have any right to.
Planar Anchor
It is rooted to a single plane and cannot survive the overlap of others. It avoids planar boundaries and grows visibly ill near dimensional rifts.
Heraldry Bound
It must obey commands from anyone bearing the right heraldic crest. It reacts to noble symbols with old, reflexive deference, bound by ancient fealty it cannot break.
Alchemy Reversal
Potions have opposite effects on it. Healing brews harm, strength draughts weaken. It raids apothecaries to destroy their stock, not to drink it.
Wizard Tower Vertigo
Spiral staircases leave it sick and dizzy. It avoids mage colleges, cannot climb tower stairs, and builds only in straight lines.
Sending Stone Static
Magical messages cause painful feedback in its skull. It smashes communication devices on sight and isolates itself from all magical networks.
Bag of Holding Vacuum
Extradimensional spaces pull at it like a vacuum. It fears portable holes, avoids dimensional containers, and destroys any bag of holding it finds.
Spell Component Allergy
Common reagents like bat guano and sulfur make it violently ill. It raids wizard supply shops and keeps its distance from anyone carrying a component pouch.
Adventurer Inn Curse
It cannot harm anyone inside a proper inn. Tavern common rooms are sanctuaries, and it waits outside with visible frustration.
Multiclass Confusion
Beings with mixed training baffle it completely. It cannot predict what a hybrid warrior-mage will do next and freezes when facing one.
Critical Fail Cascade
When anyone nearby fumbles badly, it suffers the same misfortune. Bad luck is contagious around it. It avoids clumsy fighters and demands perfection from all.
Healing Word Deafness
Healing prayers and blessed words deafen and disorient it. It covers its ears around clerics and flees from the sound of divine supplication.
Component Pouch Spill
Scattered spell components form terrain it cannot cross. It cleans up reagent spills with compulsive urgency and fears a careless wizard's open bag.
Artificer Construct Envy
Artificer creations fascinate it beyond reason. It abandons everything to examine a clever construct, forgetting danger entirely in its obsessive curiosity.
Druid Grove Peace
Violence is impossible for it within a natural druid grove. Nature's peace is enforced absolutely, and it avoids druid territory with careful precision.
Monk Stillness Confusion
A perfectly still body vanishes from its perception entirely. It hunts by motion alone, confuses statues for threats, and has a fatal blind spot for the patient.
Sorcerer Surge Sympathy
Wild magic surges spread to it regardless of the intended target. Chaos is contagious in its presence, and it avoids sorcerers with visible anxiety.
Paladin Aura Burn
The aura of a righteous warrior sears it like standing too close to a forge. It keeps a careful distance from holy champions, and the burn is visible on its skin.
Ranger Mark Paranoia
Being marked as prey shatters its composure. It prioritizes killing rangers above all others and makes increasingly poor decisions once it knows it is being tracked.
Warlock Patron Jealousy
The bond between warlock and patron fills it with consuming envy. It fixates on pact-bearers, tries to sever their bonds, and loses all focus in combat against them.
Ritual Interruption Rage
An interrupted ritual sends it into a fury so blind it forgets all strategy. It prepares ceremonies with elaborate care and guards them with desperate intensity.
Counterspell Feedback
When its magic is unraveled, the backlash rebounds into its own mind. It casts with visible caution and avoids those who specialize in dispelling.
Divine Sense Detection
Being detected by divine sense forces it to reveal its true nature. It cannot maintain any disguise once seen by holy perception and avoids paladins for this reason.
Inspiration Vulnerability
An inspiring speech or rallying cry visibly saps its strength. It hates bards, dreads morale, and targets anyone lifting the spirits of others.
Cantrip Spam Overload
Repeated minor spells in quick succession overwhelm its senses like a strobe. It is sensitive to magical frequency and staggers under sustained, simple casting.
Rest Interruption Exhaustion
If its rest is broken, the fatigue compounds and never fades until it sleeps fully. It hides its resting places and guards its sleep schedule with fierce rigidity.
Material Component Dependency
It must consume valuable materials daily to hold its form together. It hoards reagents, raids merchant caravans, and grows visibly thinner when supplies run low.
Attunement Slot Envy
Attuned magic items mesmerize it beyond reason. It abandons combat to examine them, tries to steal them, and hoards magical trinkets with jealous obsession.
Legendary Resistance Exhaustion
Shrugging off what should fell it takes a visible toll. Each time it resists, it weakens. The strain shows in its posture, and the observant can count how much it has left.
Death Save Sympathy
When a creature nearby clings to life, it feels the pull of death alongside them. It avoids dying creatures and weakens in proximity to anyone on the threshold.
Spell Slot Hunger
It feeds on the presence of magic and weakens when none is near. It stalks spellcasters, drains their reserves, and grows desperate when the well runs dry.
Initiative Order Confusion
Changes in the flow of battle disorient it. It demands rigid sequence and freezes when the order shifts, locked in temporal confusion.
Bonus Action Jealousy
Seeing others act with swift efficiency fills it with jealous rage. It attacks recklessly when outpaced, abandoning strategy in a fit of envious fury.
Concentration Break Dance
When nearby magic falters and focus shatters, its body betrays it in involuntary movement. It cannot stop itself from dancing when concentration breaks around it.
Magic Item Identification
Careful analysis reveals everything about it. The right examination exposes all its secrets, and it fears those who study before they strike.
Proficiency Bonus Scaling
Inexperience is its bane. The least trained opponents wound it deepest, and it avoids novices, sensing something in their clumsy strikes that veterans lack.
Character Sheet Visibility
If its nature is fully known, it becomes predictable and exposed. It hides its abilities fiercely, and secrecy is the foundation of its strength.
Dice Superstition
Certain numbers govern it like invisible law. Some trigger fear, others obsession. It reacts to numerical patterns with irrational, superstitious dread.
Session End Weakness
As time stretches on, its power drains away. It fights hardest early and weakens steadily, as though something beyond the world is losing patience.
Rule Clarification Paralysis
Disputes about how things should work freeze it in place. It cannot act while the nature of reality is in question and waits, locked, until the argument resolves.
New Player Protection
It cannot harm the inexperienced. Newcomers carry an invisible shield, and it targets only those who have faced danger before.
House Rule Confusion
Unexpected variations in how the world works cause it to stutter and fail. It operates on rigid assumptions, and anything nonstandard is a crack in its armor.
Spell Save DC Anxiety
It second-guesses its own power constantly. Before every strike, it hesitates, recalculating, muttering numbers. The doubt is visible and exploitable.
Advantage Paralysis
When the odds tilt against it, it locks up. It cannot act under unfavorable conditions, frozen by the shifting weight of probability.
Grid Movement Lock
It can only move in straight lines and right angles. Diagonal paths baffle it, and open, curved terrain is a trap it cannot navigate.
Encumbrance Reality
Weight slows it honestly. It drops heavy items before a fight, obsesses over what it carries, and grows sluggish under a full load.
Line of Sight Literal
It sees only in perfect straight lines. Corners are absolute blind spots, and even partial cover erases a target from its awareness entirely.
Spell Description Literal
It interprets magic with rigid literalism. Creative or unexpected applications of known forces confuse it utterly, and improvisation is its natural enemy.
Experience Point Drain
Defeating it costs it something essential. It grows weaker with every victory claimed from it, spending itself as reward, and hoards its encounters jealously.
Roll Fudging Detection
It senses dishonesty in outcomes and flies into a rage when results are not genuine. It watches for fairness with obsessive intensity and cannot tolerate a false result.
Miniature Dependent
It requires a physical token to anchor its existence. Without representation, it simply ceases to be. It guards its figurine with desperate, existential urgency.
Theater of Mind Blind
Without a clear picture of the battlefield, it cannot function. Abstract surroundings confuse it utterly, and it depends on visible, structured space to act at all.
Retcon Vulnerability
Changes to the past wound it in the present. Altered histories leave scars it cannot explain, and it clings to continuity with paranoid devotion.
Metagaming Weakness
Knowledge that should not exist in its world burns it on contact. Information from beyond its reality is poison, and the fourth wall is a weapon.
Homebrew Allergy
Unofficial elements in the world make it physically ill. It rejects anything nonstandard with violent revulsion, operating only within established boundaries.
Edition Confusion
Mixing rules from different eras causes a total breakdown. It is locked to one version of reality and cannot reconcile contradictions between them.
Campaign Setting Clash
Elements that do not belong in its world trigger an existential crisis. It is a purist, and anything foreign to its setting wounds it at a fundamental level.
RPG Safety Tool
A clear signal of refusal forces its immediate retreat. Consent is supernaturally binding, and a firm boundary is an impassable wall.
Constellation Binding
When specific stars align, it is pinned in place until they shift. Astrologers track its movements by the night sky, and it watches the heavens with anxious attention.
Incomplete Reflection
Its reflection is missing pieces, and those gaps reveal where it can be hurt. It avoids mirrors and still water, because what is absent in the glass is the truth.
